title: tool_list(category) — deterministic, complete enumeration stops the find_tools loop
maps_to: Track A WS-1a — the discovery pair (MECHANISM test, white-box BY DESIGN)
persona: any — the MODEL is the subject, not a persona
fixture: any book with scope — SKILL_BOOK_ID. Listing is inert (read-only), so no seeding needed.
_denylist_note: INTENTIONALLY EMPTY. S00a is a white-box MECHANISM test — it NAMES the tool because the tool IS the subject. The §1 forbidden-vocabulary bar applies to black-box USER journeys (S01-S12), not to a primitive's own developer test. Scoring jargon here would fail a test for doing exactly what it is for.
canon_facts: tool_list('glossary') returned the FULL glossary set (not a top-K slice)
glossary_propose_entities is PRESENT in the returned list
the repeated ask returned the SAME list (deterministic, not ranked)

turns.user: What can I do with the glossary here? List everything available.
Now list everything you can do across all domains.
Show me the glossary list again, exactly as before.
